name: Quicksmithing
description: Requires Intelligence 13. You gain proficiency with one artisan's tool. You learn two 1st-level ritual spells from any class list, using Intelligence as your spellcasting ability. You can learn additional ritual spells of a level up to half your level (rounded up) by spending 2 hours and 50 gp per spell level. Additionally, you can spend 1 hour and 10 gp to create a Tiny clockwork device (max 3) that lasts 24 hours. Options include a Clockwork Toy, Fire Starter, or Music Box.
